name: Time Tracker (WASM)
description: Track time spent on entities with a built-in timer and sync to Clockify, Toggl, or Harvest. Start/stop timers from entity pages, view time reports per entity, and auto-log hours to your team's time tracking service.
author: BiloxiStudios

default_billable.label: Default Billable
default_billable.description: Whether new time entries default to billable

hourly_rate.label: Hourly Rate
hourly_rate.description: Default hourly rate for billable time calculations

currency.label: Currency
currency.description: Currency code for rate display (e.g. USD, EUR, GBP)

provider.label: Time Tracking Provider
provider.description: External service to sync time entries: clockify, toggl, harvest, or none (local only)

auto_start_on_open.label: Auto-start Timer on Entity Open
auto_start_on_open.description: Automatically start a timer when an entity page is opened

auto_stop_on_navigate.label: Auto-stop on Navigate Away
auto_stop_on_navigate.description: Automatically stop the running timer when leaving an entity page

minimum_duration_seconds.label: Minimum Duration (seconds)
minimum_duration_seconds.description: Discard time entries shorter than this (prevents accidental micro-entries)

round_to_minutes.label: Round to Minutes
round_to_minutes.description: Round time entries up to nearest N minutes (0 for no rounding)
